title: Digital asset firm Checker raises $8 million
snippet: Checker, a global network that enables financial institutions to plug into stablecoins and digital asset liquidity, cross-border payments, treasury, and credit via a single API, announced today that it has raised $8M in funding from Galaxy Ventures, Al Mada Ventures, and Framework Ventures.

title: Bank of England outlines tokenization, stablecoin vision for UK finance
snippet: The central bank plans to publish draft rules for systemic sterling stablecoins next month and finalize them by the end of this year.

title: Stablecoin supply tops $300 billion but growth stalls as Tether gains at rivals’ expense
snippet: The bank-issued and GENIUS Act-compliant stablecoin entrants have had a harder start than many expected.

title: Revolut rolls out crypto debit card
snippet: Revolut has launched its first physical crypto debit card.

title: Tokenized equities daily volume hits all-time high of $3.57 billion
snippet: The Block's data shows onchain equities trading volume growing since the start of the year, and hitting an all-time high on Monday.

title: Euro stablecoin joint venture Qivalis adds 25 new banks
snippet: Qivalis, the joint venture company formed by European banks to launch a Euro stablecoin, has amassed the support of a further 25 banks, bringing the total number of institutions backing the project to 37.

title: Deel launches stablecoin salary payouts and appoints head of crypto
snippet: Deel, the global people platform trusted by 40,000+ businesses to hire, manage, and pay teams across 150+ countries, today launched stablecoin salary payouts and announced the formation of a dedicated crypto division, headed by Thierry Edde as Head of Crypto at Deel.

title: Euro stablecoin project Qivalis adds 25 banks ahead of launch
snippet: Qivalis expands to 37 banks after adding 25 new members across 15 countries, boosting euro stablecoin plans ahead of a second-half 2026 launch.

title: Ethereum leads $65 billion RWA race as blockchains compete for institutional tokenization flows
snippet: The distributed market structure suggests the RWA landscape has not yet consolidated around a clear winner.

title: European Commission launches MiCA review as global crypto regulatory landscape shifts
snippet: The European Commission launched a MiCA consultation open through Aug. 31, asking whether the crypto framework needs updating.

title: BoE deputy says tokenization could cut costs, boost competition
snippet: The UK central bank said digital money should remain trusted and interoperable as it weighs stablecoin reforms and near-24/7 settlement to support tokenized markets.

title: Stablecoin settlement: Why PSPs can’t afford to delay
snippet: How PSPs can push their stablecoin projects from pilot to launch.

title: Trump Orders Fed to Review Crypto Firms’ Access to Master Accounts
snippet: The order asks the Fed to review crypto firms’ access to payment rails, putting its control over master accounts under scrutiny.

AllUnity plans Swedish krona stablecoin, launches agentic payments infrastructure
snippet: AllUnity plans a Swedish krona stablecoin for June and launches x402-based agentic payments for European businesses.

Trump-backed Truth Social pulls bids for crypto ETFs
snippet: The crypto ETFs were intended to be part of Trump Media & Technology Group’s broader crypto strategy, which included the launch of the Truth.fi financial platform.

title: Bitwise calls HYPE a ‘Gen 2’ crypto token, says its undervalued
snippet: The asset manager recently launched a HYPE-based exchange-traded fund and said it will use some of the fees generated to buy the token.

title: Non-dollar stablecoins are struggling to crack 0.5% of market share
Euro-Pegged Stablecoin Wins Support From Three Dozen Banks
snippet: Euro-pegged stablecoin project Qivalis has reportedly picked up the support of 25 new banks. That brings the total number of lenders backing the effort to 37, the Financial Times (FT) reported Wednesday (May 20).
